questions.question: What is the recommended default for most applications?
questions.explanation: ML-KEM-768 + ML-DSA-65 (Category 3) provides good security/performance balance.

questions.question: When should you choose Category 5 parameters?
questions.explanation: Category 5 is for maximum security requirements like classified data.

questions.question: What factor most affects KEM variant selection?
questions.explanation: Select based on required security level and acceptable key/ciphertext sizes.

questions.question: When is SLH-DSA preferred over ML-DSA?

options.text: When maximum confidence in security assumptions is needed

questions.explanation: SLH-DSA uses only hash assumptions, providing maximum confidence.

questions.question: For TLS 1.3, what hybrid KEM is commonly deployed?
questions.explanation: X25519 + ML-KEM-768 is the standard hybrid for TLS 1.3.

questions.question: Organizations should use hybrid cryptography during the PQC transition period.
questions.explanation: Hybrid provides defense in depth if either classical or PQC is compromised.
